title: 2014 CIRI Annual Meeting
summary: A crowd of more than 400 turned out for CIRI’s 41st Annual Meeting of Shareholders June 7 at the Dena’ina Civic and Convention Center in Anchorage. title: A word from the president, June 2014
summary: By Sophie Minich, CIRI president and chief executive officer The CIRI Annual Meeting held earlier this month provided a fantastic opportunity to meet and talk with shareholders. title: Spotlight: Kassidy Whitley
summary: CIRI shareholder Kassidy Whitley isn’t your typical beauty pageant contestant. title: Missing shareholders, June 2014
summary: The following CIRI shareholders do not have a current mailing address on record. title: Southcentral Foundation reaches historic settlement with Indian Health Service
summary: A historic settlement agreement between Southcentral Foundation (SCF) and the U.S. Indian Health Service (IHS) will result in a one-time $96 million payment, plus $30 million in interest, to SCF from the federal government. title: Mabel Pike Educational Center groundbreaking ceremony
summary: The Alaska Native Heritage Center officially broke ground on the new Mabel Pike Educational Center on May 9 with plans to open this fall.
